backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the FocusRoom backend with room management, user profiles, session control, and authorization via AccessControl mixin. Implements CRUD for rooms, participants, sessions, and events stored in Maps/Sets.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the camera toggle handler replacement in CameraPreview.tsx, specifying requirements like direct getUserMedia call, permanent blur filter, error handling, and track cleanup on unmount.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, hook, and page in the FocusRoom frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, borders, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FocusRoom SPA, mounting the React app at #root and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login, lobby, room, and index (redirects to lobby), wrapped in a forced-dark ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Blocking modal dialog that forces new users to set a username (minimum 2 characters) before accessing the app, using the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Persistent app shell with a sticky header (logo, auth controls, username display), footer with attribution, and conditional rendering of ProfileSetupModal for users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/room/AmbientSoun: A dropdown toggle component that lets users select and play looping ambient sounds (rain, library, white noise) during focus phases, persisting the selection to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/room/CameraPrevi: A camera preview component that requests webcam access via getUserMedia, displays the live video feed, and handles various permission/device error states with retry support.
frontend/src/components/room/ChatPanel.t: A local chat panel that displays and sends messages within a room, blurring all messages during focus phase and storing messages as backend events.
frontend/src/components/room/Distraction: A focus-phase indicator that detects when the user leaves the browser tab for more than 10 seconds and displays a 'Stay focused!' warning overlay.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalComplet: A modal dialog shown at session end that asks the user whether they completed their stated goal, awarding XP bonuses accordingly.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalDisplay: A simple display component that renders the user's current focus goal with a target icon inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalEntryMo: A modal dialog that prompts the user to enter a focus goal before a session starts, with submit and skip options.
frontend/src/components/room/Leaderboard: A leaderboard panel that sorts and displays session XP for all participants, highlighting the current user and showing medal icons for the top three.
frontend/src/components/room/Participant: A participant list component that displays room members; currently only shows the current user locally since the backend lacks a getParticipants endpoint.
frontend/src/components/room/TimerDispla: Renders a circular SVG progress ring timer with phase label (Focus/Break/Idle), countdown digits, a glow animation on focus start, and a start button when idle.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity state, and status flags, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient in a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for room creation/joining, timer state polling, session starting, and storing chat/goal events against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile to the backend and invalidates the cached profile query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing JetBrains Mono and Inter fonts, defining dark-mode OKLCH CSS variables, and adding custom utility classes for camera blur, chat blur, timer glow, and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page that lets authenticated users create or join a focus room by code, with auto-rejoin logic for the last visited room stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that displays FocusRoom branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button. Redirects authenticated users to the lobby.
frontend/src/pages/RoomPage.tsx: Main study room page managing Pomodoro timer state, goal entry/completion, chat, camera, leaderboard, and participant list. Derives and counts down timer locally from server session data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, FocusRoom dark-theme color tokens (room-bg, focus-accent, break-accent, etc.), border radii, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the FocusRoom platform's architecture, existing features, known issues (broken room creation, camera permission popup), and overall design goals.
